name: NVIDIA CUDA
description: A package which installs NVIDIA CUDA.

version.description: The version of NVIDIA CUDA to install.

installLibraries.description: Installs all runtime CUDA Library packages.

installDevLibraries.description: Installs all development CUDA Library packages.

installTools.description: Installs all CUDA command line and visual tools.

additionalCudaPackages.description: A comma-separated list of additional CUDA packages to install. Disable the other flags to have full control over what is installed.

downloadUrl.description: The download URL to use for CUDA binaries.
